**Action taken:** Sent an email to `oncall@acme.io` with subject "Triage" listing all high-urgency triggered incident IDs.

**Number of high-urgency triggered incidents:** 5

Since there were high-urgency incidents in the triggered state, I did not post to Slack. The email body contains the IDs of all 5 such incidents.
I'll help you check PagerDuty and take the appropriate action. Let me first discover the available capabilities.
